name: document_controller_search_documents_by_code_title_or_discipline
desc: Cross-platform search. Returns matching documents filtered by query text, discipline, platform, suitability.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search text to match against document code or title

parameters.name: discipline
parameters.description: Filter by discipline: M, E, A

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Filter by platform: vfp, asite, acc
